rag_rules: Place input envelope assumptions in component type annexes using only visible feature names and concrete bounds from the requirement.
generic_rules: Use boolean helper declarations to encapsulate range conditions for clarity and type consistency.
Ensure assumptions and guarantees reference only features exposed at the component type level.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Declare helper booleans as eq range_expr : bool = feature >= min and feature <= max;
Use literal values or named constants directly in range comparisons; avoid unbound variables.
anti_patterns: Do not reference subcomponent ports or implementation-level bindings in component type annexes.
